name: FastMCP
description: Builds MCP servers and clients in Python the fast, Pythonic way — decorators for tools, resources, and prompts, with auth, testing, and deployment. Standard framework by Prefect.

skills.name: Pythonic MCP Servers
skills.description: Defines MCP tools, resources, and prompts with simple Python decorators on ordinary functions.

skills.name: MCP Client Building
skills.description: Builds MCP clients to call and compose remote MCP servers from Python code.

skills.name: Auth & Deploy
skills.description: Adds authentication, testing utilities, and deployment helpers to ship MCP servers to production.
